description: Individual line items in each order. Revenue = SUM(total_price). No discount_percent column.

chunks.text:
TABLE: order_items

DESCRIPTION: Individual line items in each order. Revenue = SUM(total_price). No discount_percent column.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: order items, line items, order details, what was ordered, products in order, items purchased, cart items

PRIMARY_KEY: order_item_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: order_id → orders.order_id, product_id → products.product_id

COLUMNS: order_item_id, order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price, total_price

USE_CASES: Revenue by product, bestsellers, order breakdown, product sales analysis
